quality.rationale: 利用黎曼张量固有对称性进行数据压缩，具有明确的计算物理背景与完整算法实现

origin.question: Problem 9.3. Mathematical manipulations with the Riemann tensor are often done with computers. Rather than calculate and store the $4^4 = 256$ components of the tensor as $\mathbf{R}(\mathbf{I},\mathbf{J},\mathbf{K},\mathbf{L})$ with $\mathbf{I},\mathbf{J},\mathbf{K},\mathbf{L} = 0,1,2,3$ , the symmetries of the Riemann tensor can be used to reduce the size of the stored array. Design a subprogram which stores or recalls all components of $\mathbf{R}(\mathbf{I},\mathbf{J},\mathbf{K},\mathbf{L})$ in a linear array of dimensions $\leq 21$ .## SolutionSolution 9.3. The problem requires ordering 21 independent components in some canonical way and assigning a number $\mathbf{N} \leq 21$ to each nonequivalent quadruple $\mathbf{I}, \mathbf{J}, \mathbf{K}, \mathbf{L}$ . The following program accomplishes this and reads the value of $\mathbf{R}(\mathbf{I}, \mathbf{J}, \mathbf{K}, \mathbf{L})$ from $\mathbf{R}(\mathbf{N})$ , $\mathbf{1} \leq \mathbf{N} \leq 21$ .READ I, J, K, LSET SIGN = 1IF $\mathbf{I} = \mathbf{J}$ OR $\mathbf{K} = \mathbf{L}$ SET RIEMANN $= 0$ AND RETURNIF I > J EXCHANGE I, J AND SET SIGN = -1IF $\mathbf{K} > \mathbf{L}$ EXCHANGE K, L AND SET SIGN $= -$ SIGNSET $\mathbf{N1} = (5*\mathbf{I} - \mathbf{I}*\mathbf{I}) / 2 + \mathbf{J}$SET $\mathbf{N}2 = (5*\mathbf{K} - \mathbf{K}*\mathbf{K}) / 2 + \mathbf{L}$IF N1 > N2 EXCHANGE N1, N2SET $\mathbf{N} = (13*\mathrm{N1} - \mathrm{N1}*\mathrm{N1} - 12) / 2 + \mathrm{N2}$SET RIEMANN = R(N)*SIGNRETURN.
origin.solution: Solution 9.3. The problem requires ordering 21 independent components in some canonical way and assigning a number $\mathbf{N} \leq 21$ to each nonequivalent quadruple $\mathbf{I}, \mathbf{J}, \mathbf{K}, \mathbf{L}$ . The following program accomplishes this and reads the value of $\mathbf{R}(\mathbf{I}, \mathbf{J}, \mathbf{K}, \mathbf{L})$ from $\mathbf{R}(\mathbf{N})$ , $\mathbf{1} \leq \mathbf{N} \leq 21$ .READ I, J, K, LSET SIGN = 1IF $\mathbf{I} = \mathbf{J}$ OR $\mathbf{K} = \mathbf{L}$ SET RIEMANN $= 0$ AND RETURNIF I > J EXCHANGE I, J AND SET SIGN = -1IF $\mathbf{K} > \mathbf{L}$ EXCHANGE K, L AND SET SIGN $= -$ SIGNSET $\mathbf{N1} = (5*\mathbf{I} - \mathbf{I}*\mathbf{I}) / 2 + \mathbf{J}$SET $\mathbf{N}2 = (5*\mathbf{K} - \mathbf{K}*\mathbf{K}) / 2 + \mathbf{L}$IF N1 > N2 EXCHANGE N1, N2SET $\mathbf{N} = (13*\mathrm{N1} - \mathrm{N1}*\mathrm{N1} - 12) / 2 + \mathrm{N2}$SET RIEMANN = R(N)*SIGNRETURN.
